description: Add deterministic procurement E2E scenarios only after the core Ash gate and required provider readiness: OpenGov adapter, BidNet session custody, SAM budgeting/scheduling, and browser-secret handling. Prove one API-first source and one authenticated/browser-required source from runnable Acquisition Source through retrieval, normalized extraction, Bid persistence, Finding projection, document/provenance state, and operator queue visibility. Acceptance: SAM plus provider-adapter fixtures pass offline, valid credentials remain secret, and auth, throttling, selector/schema, retry, duplicate-delivery, and zero-result failures land in correct durable health states.
title: Prove procurement retrieval end to end
